items.title: Epistemic Passivity
items.summary: A literature review examining epistemic agency, cognitive offloading, and the risks of epistemic passivity arising from increased reliance on generative AI.

items.title: Algorithmic Abdication and Intellectual Atrophy in the Era of Generative AI
items.summary: A literature review examining algorithmic abdication, cognitive offloading, and intellectual atrophy in the age of generative AI.

items.title: The Digital Funnel: Revealing the Techniques of Algorithmic Radicalization
items.summary: An examination of how recommendation engines, engagement farming, and filter bubble entrenchment systematically steer users toward radical content — and how transparency and digital literacy can counter it.

items.title: Intellectual Abdication Effect of AI and Internet and Its Role in the Erosion of Intelligence and the Rise of Algorithmic Radicalization
items.summary: A literature review examining how intellectual abdication — the transfer of mental work to AI systems — erodes human intelligence through the Distributed Atrophy Model and creates the ideal conditions for algorithmic radicalization.
